arguments.task: Visit https://systeme.io and official systeme.io pages to determine whether there is public API or developer documentation, what authentication methods are documented for any API or integrations, what pricing/access tier applies, and whether there is mention of MCP or GitHub MCP. Prefer first-party pages such as official docs, pricing, support, changelog, developers, API docs, and legal pages. Also check if there is a public API documentation page or app marketplace page. Extract exact URLs visited and concise findings with quotes where relevant. Do not log in.

input.thought: Start browser research on official systeme.io web properties for API, auth, pricing, and MCP evidence.

Return concise bullet findings with exact page URLs. Do not browse unrelated sites.

raw_result.description: All-in-one marketing platform for funnels, email marketing, courses, communities, and automations.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official Public API uses an API key sent in the X-API-Key header. Official MCP server docs indicate authentication via X-MCP-Key header or mcpKey query parameter. Evidence gathered did not verify OAuth or user-scoped token flows.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official help documentation says Public API access is available only on Webinar and Unlimited plans, which are paid pricing tiers.

api_surface.breadth: Official developer docs expose a public API with standard REST concepts including authentication, pagination, and rate-limit headers; exact endpoint breadth was not fully enumerated from gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official systeme.io MCP documentation exists, including a dedicated MCP server doc and help-center articles for connecting with Claude/ChatGPT. No GitHub repository was verified from the gathered evidence.

raw_result.blocker: API access is gated to paid Webinar/Unlimited plans, so a toolkit is buildable only with a paid account and some endpoint-surface verification.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Developer docs indicate rate-limiting headers are exposed (X-RateLimit headers). Exact numeric limits were not verified from the gathered evidence.
raw_result.notable_signals: Public API link is exposed from the main site footer; official developer docs exist; official MCP help category and MCP server docs exist; MCP auth differs from API auth via X-MCP-Key or mcpKey.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Some fields remain only partially verified from the gathered evidence: exact numeric rate limits, exact pricing details on Webinar/Unlimited plan names/costs, full endpoint breadth, and whether MCP has any official GitHub/registry listing.
